narrative:
Cols 72-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 771 registered voters, with 48.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.8 percentage points.
